formula_independence.commit_message: fix(c-120): correct Silk damping formula — 17.8σ FAIL → 0.17σ PASS
formula_independence.verdict: NOT a genuine prediction. Formula was adjusted to match Planck after v1 failed.

ds_independence.verdict: d_s is robust and was frozen before G26.

ell_D_T_independence.source: T-052 best-fit on Planck CMB TT data
ell_D_T_independence.verdict: ell_D_T is derived from Planck CMB data, not independent.

reasons: ell_D_T derived from Planck CMB data (partial circularity)
One document explicitly says mu1 was 'calibrated on Planck'
what_is_solid: d_s ~ 4 from Jaccard graph is robust and independent
K_R universality across scales (G27) may be cleaner
global_verdict.recommendation: Pre-register formula and parameters before next test.
